products.description: This Crystal piece has a 4 3/4" wide tablet that rises 7 1/4" from the clear crystal base to  a peak of 8 1/4". The slant top features a 2 3/8" diameter golf ball at the center. With plenty of space for personalization on the tablet and the base, this award is ideal for recognizing skill on the golf course! The award is packaged in a lined presentation box for added elegance.
products.imageAlt: Crystal Slant Golf Tablet
